case_title: PAMELA E PELTIER VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PELTIER, PAMELA E AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY RODRIGUEZ, CARLOS R DRIVER OF S.F.MUNI BUS - LINE	 - MOTOR COACH #8444 - ID#2418 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF AMENDING CLAIM. NAMING THE CORRECT DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND DISMISSING TWO DEFENDANTS: SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY AND CARLOS R. RODRIGUEZ. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PELTIER, PAMELA E

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOE ABAD--ADJUSTER AND DANIELLE CORKHILL--INTERN FOR CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PELTIER, PAMELA E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT.
